riskFloorReasons: safety-invariant proximity: src/messaging/TelegramAdapter.ts matches Telegram adapter

causalAutopsy.notes: LiveTailSource shipped 2026-05-27 in the cross-machine seamlessness implementation (PR #428 era, spec §8 G3b) with an inverted change-detection model: it built every topic's full content each tick to discover nothing changed, and the Telegram content provider did a full synchronous JSONL read per call. Correct-but-costly at small scale; became pathological as known-topic count and the 75k-line message log grew, and SURFACED only when the multi-machine mesh was enabled with a real standby peer (per-tick work + hot retry on peer 403s). Not caused by a recent PR — a latent scale flaw activated by mesh enablement, same activation event Justin flagged: multi-machine enablement causing loop overloads.
